# Changelog

All notable changes to the `skill-contribution-assistant` skill are documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] - 2026-04-21 - @AlexP0lo

### Added

- Initial release of skill authoring playbook for AL Copilot Skill Collection
- Non-intrusive community opportunity detection rules
- Mandatory onboarding interview for authors after explicit confirmation
- Build workflow from idea to PR-ready skill
- Quality, governance, and PR-readiness guidelines
